ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp the data was received */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was received */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset class */,
  "feed_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feed source */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "value_a" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (A) */,
  "value_b" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (B) */,
  "value_c" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (C) */,
  "value_d" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (D) */,
  "value_e" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (E) */,
  "value_f" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (F) */,
  "value_g" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (G) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_feed_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_source_id") REFERENCES feed_sources ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_classes" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset class */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the asset class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset class */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the asset class */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the asset class belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the feed source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feed source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the feed source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the feed source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset class */,
  "feed_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feed source */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "effective_from" TEXT /* Date from which the permission is effective */,
  "effective_to" TEXT /* Date until which the permission is effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_feed_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_source_id") REFERENCES feed_sources ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the alert */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset class */,
  "feed_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feed source */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggered the alert (e.g., price above 50) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_feed_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_source_id") REFERENCES feed_sources ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp the data was received */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was received */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset class */,
  "feed_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feed source */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "value_a" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (A) */,
  "value_b" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (B) */,
  "value_c" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (C) */,
  "value_d" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (D) */,
  "value_e" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (E) */,
  "value_f" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (F) */,
  "value_g" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument (G) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data point
Exact timestamp the data was received
Unique identifier for each asset class
Risk level associated with the asset class
Sector to which the asset class belongs
Unique identifier for each feed source
Reliability score of the feed source
Geographical location of the feed source
Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, administrator)
